Reliability and Stability (30%) concerns were raised due to issues like app crashes, delayed updates, and incorrect balance displays. User Experience and Interface (25%) received feedback on ease of use, with requests for improvements such as live stock refreshing and clearer tax reports. Financial Operations and Support (40%) had complaints about cashback usage restrictions, high exchange rate differences, and problems with investment processes. Growth and Feature Enhancement (5%) suggestions included introducing local language exams, allowing SIP amount edits, and expanding investment options to other countries.

Many users have reported issues with adding money to their US stock accounts, transferring funds, and linking bank accounts. The app's UI has also been criticized for being basic and glitchy. However, some users have praised the app for its ease of use, comprehensive features, and smooth trading experience.

summary: The Weekly Review Pulse highlights the major concerns and praises from users. Product Features and Security make up 35%, with users requesting new features like strategy builders, emergency funds, and improvement in the UI.

Users have reported frustration with the US stock investment process, interface issues, and difficulties with adding money to their accounts. Despite these issues, some users have praised the app's intuitive design and helpful customer support.

summary: This week's review pulse highlights key areas of concern for the application, including user experience and performance, security and trust, feature enhancement and requests, and support and onboarding. Users have reported issues with the new UI, including poor design and functionality. Some users have also reported issues with their accounts, including incorrect bank account linking and missing features such as goal tracking. The application has also faced criticism for its customer support, with some users reporting unresponsive support teams.

email_subject: Weekly INDMoney Voice of Customer Pulse
email_body: The weekly review pulse indicates that 30% of users are experiencing transaction and payment issues, 25% are dissatisfied with the user experience and interface, 20% are having trouble with account management and setup, and 25% are unhappy with customer support and features. Users are complaining about problems with cashback, high transaction fees, and poor customer support. Some users appreciate the app's functionality and ease of use, but many are frustrated with the constant changes to the UI/UX.
